easement_purpose: vehicular and pedestrian ingress and egress
source_instrument: an Easement Deed dated June 9, 2026 and recorded in the York County Registry of Deeds in Book 4321, Page 100
legal_description: The land of the Grantee at 100 State Road, Kittery, shown on a plan recorded in the York County Registry of Deeds in Book 401, Page 12, formerly burdened by the released easement.
